package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringsSplitnTwoIndexZeroCut() string {
    ruleID := "strings_splitn_two_index_zero_cut"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`strings.SplitN(..., 2)[0]` instead of `strings.Cut(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
